description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair and a goatee against a height chart, captioned 'SECOND-DEGREE MANSLAUGHTER & TAMPERING WITH PHYSICAL EVIDENCE' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Philadelphia' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: SECOND-DEGREE MANSLAUGHTER & TAMPERING WITH PHYSICAL EVIDENCE; Worst of the Worst; Philadelphia; ICE
